reactions.label: value_modeled
reactions.interest: teachers' labour rights and professional dignity
reactions.public_good_frame: no education reform is real that is done against its teachers
reactions.argument: A documented 2026 union position this archetype draws on: if the tracks continue, the admission system must be corrected and segregation actively reduced.
reactions.condition_to_change: Correction designed with the profession, not imposed on it.

reactions.label: value_modeled
reactions.interest: teachers' labour rights and professional dignity
reactions.public_good_frame: no education reform is real that is done against its teachers
reactions.argument: The documented union position this archetype draws on argued for keeping the tracks while fixing access — phase-down was a different union's position.
reactions.condition_to_change: A 'professional reconsideration' with the profession could reopen this.

reactions.label: value_modeled
reactions.interest: teachers' labour rights and professional dignity
reactions.public_good_frame: no education reform is real that is done against its teachers
reactions.argument: The documented programme this archetype draws on asks only for professional reconsideration of the structure; wholesale restructuring amid unresolved pay and workload disputes is not its demand.
reactions.condition_to_change: Settle the 2023 strike demands first; then structure can be discussed on merits.

reactions.label: value_modeled
reactions.interest: teachers' labour rights and professional dignity
reactions.public_good_frame: no education reform is real that is done against its teachers
reactions.argument: Priority funding for disadvantaged schools and lower workloads are literally in the documented programme this archetype draws on.
reactions.condition_to_change: The package must include the NOKS staff, not only teachers.
